'''Combat gloves''' were a pair of padded [[Glove/Legends|gloves]]<ref name="RPG-Core">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref> that provided the wearer with additional impact power with every punch because of their weight and materials used in their construction. They were usually carried by anyone who expected to get into a brawl or fistfight,<ref name="SECR" /> such as practicers of [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]],<ref name="TOTG">''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]''</ref> [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]],<ref name="TOTG" /><ref name="KOTORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> and [[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]].<ref name="TOTG" />
